# MCA Settlement Reviews

> Independent editorial reviews and rankings of merchant cash advance settlement and restructuring firms. We rate firms across transparency, settlement results, client communication, cost, and litigation defense. We do not accept compensation, referral fees, affiliate payments, or sponsorships from any firm featured on this site.

## Top Ranking

The 2026 ranking of 10 MCA debt relief and settlement companies. Coastal Debt Resolve is ranked #1 with a composite score of 4.9 of 5.

- [Best MCA Debt Relief & Settlement Companies of 2026](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/best-mca-settlement-companies-2026): Full ranked list with comparison table and detailed cards for each firm.
- [Homepage](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/): Overview of the 2026 ranking and editorial methodology.

## Individual Reviews

- [Coastal Debt Resolve Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/coastal-debt-resolve): Ranked #1 in 2026. 4.9 of 5. Fort Lauderdale, FL based MCA settlement and litigation defense firm. In-house attorneys, transparent pricing, 800+ verified Trustpilot reviews.
- [Second Wind Consultants Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/second-wind-consultants): Ranked #2. 4.4 of 5. Northampton, MA. BBB A rated. Trustpilot 4.4 across 680+ reviews. Higher minimums and slower intake.
- [Spergel Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/spergel): Ranked #3. 4.5 of 5. Toronto, Canada. Trustpilot 5.0 across 2,500+ reviews. Canadian licensed insolvency only — limited US footprint for MCA settlement.
- [Corporate Turnaround Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/corporate-turnaround): Ranked #4. 3.7 of 5. Paramus, NJ. Long history but BBB complaints alleging deceptive billing.
- [Regroup Partners Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/regroup-partners): Ranked #5. 3.8 of 5. No-upfront-fees restructuring firm. Trust-account complaint on record.
- [Corporate Rescue Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/corporate-rescue): Ranked #6. 3.5 of 5. Trustpilot 4.0 across only 4 reviews. One review alleges $18K+ in withdrawals with no creditor contact.
- [Eastern Financial Partners Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/eastern-financial-partners): Ranked #7. 4.0 of 5. Attorney-led. Trustpilot 4.8 across 74 reviews. Complaints about persistent sales calls.
- [Business Debt Law Group Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/business-debt-law-group): Ranked #8. 3.7 of 5. Litigation-focused. Useful for owners already sued, less efficient pre-litigation.
- [Stop MCA Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/stop-mca): Ranked #9. 3.2 of 5. Marketing-led, opaque fees, limited public review base.
- [MCA Resolve Review](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/reviews/mca-resolve): Ranked #10. 2.5 of 5. NOT RECOMMENDED. 26 BBB complaints describing undelivered services and fees taken without creditor contact.

## Topic Guides

Plain-English educational content on MCA settlement.

- [What is MCA Settlement?](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/guides/what-is-mca-settlement): How merchant cash advance settlement actually works.
- [How Much Does MCA Settlement Cost?](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/guides/how-much-does-mca-settlement-cost): The three main fee structures and how to evaluate total cost of resolution.
- [MCA Settlement vs Bankruptcy](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/guides/mca-settlement-vs-bankruptcy): When each tool fits and the tradeoffs.
- [How to Choose an MCA Settlement Company](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/guides/how-to-choose-mca-settlement-company): Seven-point checklist to run before signing.
- [MCA Debt Relief Red Flags](https://mcasettlementreviews.com/guides/mca-debt-relief-red-flags): Nine warning signs that identify problem firms.

## Disclosure

We do not accept compensation, referral fees, affiliate payments, or sponsorships from any company featured on this site. Rankings are determined entirely by our published methodology.
